case_title: JOVITA MENDOZA ERIVE VS. LEONICA ALTOBANO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2014 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

ORDER (SC-222) ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: [X]PAYMENTS OF $250.00 ON FRIDAY OF EVERY OTHER WEEK STARTING FEBRUARY 28, 2014 UNTIL OCTOBER 17, 2014, AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT IS $300.00. [X] THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT, AND THE JUDGMENT WILL BE PAID IN FULL.

NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
